## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss AI collaboration between Egnyte and fwd.digital, focusing on Egnyte's AI roadmap and potential engagement strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Egnyte's AI roadmap: Phase 1 (Co-pilot), Phase 2 (Knowledge bases), Phase 3 (Workflows)](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [Initial engagement: 25 hours for $3k, focused on validating AI outputs for specs and other AEC documents](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=49.0)
  - [Data security is crucial: All work must be done within Egnyte's platform, no data sharing outside](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Potential for ongoing collaboration, starting small and scaling up based on product team's satisfaction](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=935.0)

## Topics

### Egnyte's AI Roadmap

  - [Phase 1 (Current focus): Co-pilot for interacting with individual documents](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=725.0)
  - [Phase 2: Knowledge bases for querying across multiple documents](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Phase 3: Workflows for more advanced AI-driven processes](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [Emphasis on keeping data within Egnyte's platform due to security concerns](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=611.0)

### Initial Engagement Scope

  - [25 hours of consulting work for $3,000](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
  - [Focus on validating AI outputs for specs and other AEC documents](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [Nadia (subject matter expert) to guide on typical prompts and expected results](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=755.0)
  - [Potential to expand scope after initial phase](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)

### Collaboration Process

  - [Set up Slack Connect channel for easy communication](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1275.0)
  - [Egnyte to provide beta environment access for testing co-pilot and knowledge base modules](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Marcel to supply sample documents for testing (e.g., specs, RFPs, RFIs)](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [Weekly updates and deliverables to be shared via Slack](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)

### Future Opportunities

  - [Potential for Marcel to share advanced AI knowledge with Egnyte's team](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Possibility of integrating fwd.digital's workflow expertise in later phases](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Exploration of contract analysis as an additional area of collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Potential for Marcel to assist in sourcing a contracts expert for Egnyte](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=2343.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to send updated Scope of Work (25 hours) and NDA](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1524.0)
  - [Set up Slack Connect channel and await admin approval](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1407.0)
  - [Egnyte to provide beta environment access](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Schedule kickoff meeting with product team](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1419.0)
  - [Begin work on spec validation, starting with one document type](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Explore potential for contract analysis collaboration and expert sourcing](https://fathom.video/share/TGQDMx1wRJN8LFKcHRsDAn-VrZizQopy?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
